did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review of telemedicine's role in skin cancer care. While it discusses artificial intelligence as an emerging technology that holds potential to enhance diagnostic accuracy and triage, it does not report on a study where AI/ML was actually used to obtain the primary results. The results presented are based on the clinical utility, diagnostic accuracy, and workflow of teledermatology (store-and-forward, live video, dermoscopy) compared to face-to-face consultations.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
